description_long: This object is a small, slender bird with a streamlined body and a long, narrow tail. Its plumage is predominantly dark brown to black, with a subtle gradient from the head to the tail. The bird has a short, pointed beak and a distinct white spot near the eye, giving it a striking facial feature. The wings are compact and held close to the body, while the tail is straight and tapers to a point. The overall appearance suggests a bird adapted for agile flight and perching in urban environments.
description: A slender, dark-plumaged bird with a long, pointed tail and a white spot near the eye. Its body is streamlined and its beak is short and pointed.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's elongated body, pointed beak, and long, straight tail.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the bird's narrow back, compact wings, and the full length of its tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the white eye spot, short beak, and the smooth gradient of dark plumage.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded head, short beak, and the symmetry of the bird's body.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid dark coloration with a subtle gradient and a distinct white eye spot
